response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but his resume overstates seniority, lacks clear evidence of PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience, and shows minimal relevance to renewable energy/construction tech; his German language skill is basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience across React, Node.js, and AWS
Proven ability to build scalable systems and integrate diverse data sources
Active open-source contributions and deep understanding of software architecture
concerns: No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or Nest.js, key required technologies
German language proficiency is only basic, conflicting with high on-site needs in Berlin
Resume reads as senior-level despite applying for junior/mid role, raising red flags about fit and expectations
